action.reasoning: Observation: Error in model.py - hidden_states from MIT-b5 are 4D [B,C,H,W] not 3D [B,L,C]. The transformers library's SegFormer returns spatial feature maps directly. Analysis: Use SegformerForSemanticSegmentation from transformers which has the full pipeline built in, avoiding shape issues. Decision: Rewrite model.py to use SegformerForSemanticSegmentation directly, fix train.py and predict.py accordingly.

- MISSING:	those params were newly initialized because missing from the checkpoint. Consider training on your downstream task.
